data.title: Aster's surge in DEX trading volume outpaces Hyperliquid on Binance Chain, intensifying their rivalry for market dominance.
data.description: The competition for market share on Binance Chain has intensified with the introduction of the new DEX Aster, leading to a surpassing of Hyperliquid in 24-hour perpetual trading volume.

data.title: XRP trades at $2.88, RSI at 44.24 signals mixed momentum, consolidating near key levels; traders await direction.
data.description: The digital currency Ripple (XRP) is currently priced at $2.88, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates a neutral stance at 44.24. This suggests that Ripple is consolidating around crucial support levels as traders remain on standby for a clear market direction.

data.title: Wall Street cautious as Ethereum bulls predict a potential supercycle with growing adoption and AI platforms. BitMine holds the most Ether.
data.description: The largest corporate holder of Ether, BitMine, suggests that increased adoption of cryptocurrency on Wall Street and the utilization of advanced AI platforms could potentially trigger a significant surge in activity for Ethereum. This phenomenon, often referred to as a "supercycle," has the potential to substantially impact the market dynamics surrounding Ethereum.

data.title: Emobi and Curo team up to provide seamless EV charging access for fleets nationwide. Fast electrification with Emobi's network via Curo's platform.
data.description: Emobi, the most extensive EV charging roaming network in North America, has partnered with Curo to enhance electrification by linking fleets to Emobi's charging network through Curo's platform. This collaboration, announced in San Francisco on September 24, 2025, aims to facilitate faster and more cost-effective electric vehicle charging solutions. Emobi offers a vast charging infrastructure, while Curo provides a platform for streamlined fleet connectivity. The partnership promises to improve accessibility to charging stations for electric vehicles, benefiting customers with efficient and affordable charging options.

data.title: ETH price near $4,180 test lower support, RSI at 40 suggests downside, as SEC shortens ETF approval to 75 days.
data.description: The current price of Ethereum (ETH) is standing at $4,180, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 40. This RSI level indicates the possibility of a further decrease in price. The United States Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has implemented a faster approval process for Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs), now taking only 75 days as opposed to the previous longer timeline.
Jiuzi Holdings, Inc. appoints Dr. Doug Buerger as COO, board endorses crypto asset investment policy with up to $1 billion deployment.

data.title: BNB price exceeds $1,000 amid bullish momentum, trading at $1,022.60. Key resistance at $1,083 expected.
data.description: The current trading price of Binance Coin stands at $1,022.60 and is showing robust bullish signals across various timeframes. This indicates the possibility of challenging the resistance level of $1,083 in the near future.

data.title: Circus SE partners with Meta for AI defense program, expanding to Europe. Meta's Llama AI models already used by Five Eyes nations.
data.description: MUNICH – Circus SE, a prominent global technology firm specializing in AI robotics for independent nutrition systems and troop supply, has revealed the expansion of its partnership with Meta to include its Llama defense AI program. Meta, a well-known company listed on NASDAQ (META), initially provided its Llama AI models to the Five Eyes nations - Australia, Canada, New Zealand, and the United Kingdom – for national security applications in the previous year. This extension of collaboration signifies a strategic move by Circus SE and Meta to further enhance defense capabilities through advanced AI technology.

data.title: Tom Lee challenges Powell's warning about overvalued markets, points out Fed has never deemed stocks attractively priced.
data.description: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell recently stated that stock prices appear "fairly highly valued", sparking concerns among investors. However, Tom Lee, Fundstrat's Head of Research, offered a different perspective, advising investors not to be alarmed by Powell's comments. Lee emphasized that the cautious language used by the central bank is common and not necessarily indicative of a bearish outlook. He pointed out that historically, the Fed does not make bullish statements on asset prices, making Powell's observation standard procedure. Powell's remarks at a conference unsettled some investors, as he highlighted that some prices are elevated compared to historical levels. Lee's reassurance on social media aimed to calm potential fears and remind investors of the Fed's usual approach to such statements.

data.title: Sercomm opens Denver test house for real-home testing, integrates with Alethea's WiCheck platform, aims to accelerate operator validation.
data.description: A cutting-edge facility in Denver has been established to combine modular environments with Sercomm Ares software and the WiCheck test platform from Alethea. This strategic integration aims to streamline operator validation processes and reduce time to market. The facility's launch took place on September 24, 2025, and it is expected to significantly enhance efficiency in telecom operations. Sercomm, listed on the TWSE as 5388, is a prominent player in the industry and this collaboration is set to drive innovation and competitiveness in the telecom sector.

data.title: Braavo Capital marks 10 years, $2 billion deployed in financing for app growth, anticipates future growth.
data.description: A ten-year milestone is being celebrated by Braavo Capital as the foremost funding partner for mobile app businesses, marking a decade of supporting innovation and expansion in the worldwide app economy. Braavo, established in September 2015, has been instrumental in providing app developers with essential capital, contributing significantly to the growth of the industry.

data.title: uniQure secures $125M in non-dilutive funds and refinances existing $50M debt, totaling $175M.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.2%. This marks a significant drop from the previous rate of 5.1%. Additionally, the economy added 500,000 new jobs last month, surpassing expectations and indicating positive growth in the job market. The report also highlighted an increase in consumer spending, with a rise of 2.5% compared to the previous quarter. These numbers suggest a promising outlook for the economy as it continues to recover from the impact of the pandemic.

data.title: Mirion to buy Paragon Energy Solutions for $585 million, a top provider for nuclear plants and SMRs.
data.description: Atlanta-based Mirion, a global leader in radiation detection solutions, has announced the acquisition of Paragon Energy Solutions in a deal worth around $585 million in cash. Mirion provides services to various sectors including nuclear, medical, defense, and research. The acquisition from Windjammer Capital Investors is part of Mirion's expansion strategy, aiming to enhance its offerings in the nuclear power industry. The agreement marks a significant move for Mirion as it continues to grow its presence in the market.

data.title: Europe Activated Carbon Market for Water Treatment expected to reach $825 million by 2035, growing at CAGR of 7.45% from $371.4 million in 2024.
data.description: A report on the Europe activated carbon market for water treatment has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market is expected to achieve a significant growth, with projections indicating a rise to $825.0 million by 2035 from $371.4 million recorded in 2024. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.45% for the forecast period spanning 2025-2035. The utilization of activated carbon in water treatment processes within Europe is deemed crucial for meeting water quality standards and addressing environmental concerns.

data.title: Ethereum (ETH) price at $4,180 amid bearish trend as RSI hits 40, despite SEC's ETF approval in 75 days.
data.description: The price of ETH is currently standing at $4,180, while its Relative Strength Index (RSI) sits at 40. This indicates a possibility of further decline in the value of ETH. The SEC has implemented a streamlined process for approving ETFs, reducing the timeline to 75 days.

data.title: Aster surpasses Hyperliquid in open interest with a $1.25B increase. Recorded $24.7B in daily trading volumes, beating Hyperliquid and edgeX.
data.description: According to data from DefiLlama, Aster had the highest daily perpetual trading volumes on Wednesday, reaching $24.7 billion. This exceeded the volumes of competitors such as Hyperliquid and edgeX.

data.title: Alithya Group inc. wins the 2025-2026 Microsoft AI Business Solutions Inner Circle award for outstanding sales and innovation.
data.description: Alithya Group inc, a company listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ALYA, received recognition from Microsoft for its exceptional sales performance and innovation. The announcement was made in Montreal on September 24, 2025. Alithya has been chosen to be part of the prestigious AI Business Solutions 2025-2026 Microsoft Inner Circle, a select group of top-performing partners. This acknowledgment highlights Alithya's commitment to excellence in the field.

data.title: Insight Molecular Diagnostics will present GraftAssure™ technology at conferences in Singapore & Orlando.
data.description: Today, in Nashville, Tennessee, Insight Molecular Diagnostics Inc. (Nasdaq: IMDX) disclosed its presence at two significant industry conferences. The company, also known as iMDx, will highlight its innovative GraftAssure™ technology during the events. Of note is the discussion on its clinical kitted test currently in the development phase.

data.title: Ming Shing Group Holdings Limited appoints new Board member to help achieve mission of leading wet trades works provider.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, Ming Shing Group Holdings Limited, a company based in Hong Kong and listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol MSW, specializing in wet trades works, revealed a noteworthy development within its Board of Directors. The company's goal is to emerge as the foremost wet trades works service provider in Hong Kong.
